name: PP-野牛 | 设施系列·速写图
nameZh: PP-野牛 | 设施系列·速写图
descriptionEn: The Bizon SMG is low-damage, but offers a uniquely designed high-capacity drum magazine that reloads quickly. A grayscale hydrographic pattern resembling a nuclear power plant has been applied. \"Your point of entry is the ventilation system\"
descriptionZh: 野牛微型冲锋枪造成的伤害虽然较低，但它具有设计独特的高容量弹鼓，可以快速换弹。 这把武器采用了类似于核能的灰色水文图案。 “你的切入点是通风系统”
